en: Then Job answered and said:
zh: 於是約伯回答說：

en: "Oh that my vexation were weighed, and all my calamity laid in the balances!
zh: “但願稱稱我的煩惱， 把我的災害一起放在天平上。

en: For then it would be heavier than the sand of the sea; therefore my words have been rash.
zh: 現在這些都比海沙更重， 所以我冒失發言。

en: For the arrows of the Almighty are in me; my spirit drinks their poison; the terrors of God are arrayed against me.
zh: 因為全能者的箭射中我， 我的靈喝盡了箭的毒液， 神的驚嚇排陣攻擊我。

en: Does the wild donkey bray when he has grass, or the ox low over his fodder?
zh: 野驢有草料還會哀鳴嗎？ 牛有飼料還會窮叫嗎？

en: Can that which is tasteless be eaten without salt, or is there any taste in the juice of the mallow?
zh: 淡而無鹽的食物有甚麼好吃呢？ 蛋白有甚麼味道呢？

en: My appetite refuses to touch them; they are as food that is loathsome to me.
zh: 這些使我惡心的食物， 我必不肯嘗。

en: "Oh that I might have my request, and that God would fulfill my hope,
zh: 但願我得著我所祈求的， 願 神賜我所盼望的。

en: that it would please God to crush me, that he would let loose his hand and cut me off!
zh: 願他樂意把我壓碎， 願他放手把我剪除。

en: This would be my comfort; I would even exult in pain unsparing, for I have not denied the words of the Holy One.
zh: 這樣，我們得安慰， 在無情的痛苦之中我還可以歡躍， 因為我沒有否認那聖者的言語。

en: What is my strength, that I should wait? And what is my end, that I should be patient?
zh: 我有甚麼力量使我能等候呢？ 我的結局是甚麼好叫我忍耐呢？

en: Is my strength the strength of stones, or is my flesh bronze?
zh: 我的氣力是石頭一樣嗎？ 我的肉身是銅的嗎？

en: Have I any help in me, when resource is driven from me?
zh: 我裡面不是無能自助嗎？ 見識不是離我而去嗎？

en: "He who withholds kindness from a friend forsakes the fear of the Almighty.
zh: 朋友應該憐憫灰心的人， 因為他捨棄了對全能者的敬畏。

en: My brothers are treacherous as a torrent-bed, as torrential streams that pass away,
zh: 我的兄弟詭詐像乾涸的溪流， 又像流乾的溪水；

en: which are dark with ice, and where the snow hides itself.
zh: 水流因冰塊融化而混濁， 有雪隱藏在其中。

en: When they melt, they disappear; when it is hot, they vanish from their place.
zh: 天氣一暖溪水就消失， 氣候一熱就乾涸。

en: The caravans turn aside from their course; they go up into the waste and perish.
zh: 商隊順溪而行，結果偏離原道， 走到荒野之地而死亡。

en: The caravans of Tema look, the travelers of Sheba hope.
zh: 提瑪的商隊瞻望溪水， 示巴的客旅等候水流。

en: They are ashamed because they were confident; they come there and are disappointed.
zh: 他們失望，因為所盼望的落了空； 他們到達那裡就灰心。

en: For you have now become nothing; you see my calamity and are afraid.
zh: 現在你們就是這樣， 看見我的災難就害怕。

en: Have I said, 'Make me a gift'? Or, 'From your wealth offer a bribe for me'?
zh: 難道我說過‘請供給我’， 或說‘取你們的財物餽贈我’嗎？

en: Or, 'Deliver me from the adversary's hand'? Or, 'Redeem me from the hand of the ruthless'?
zh: 或我說過‘救我脫離敵人的手’， 或說‘贖我脫離強暴人的手’嗎？

en: "Teach me, and I will be silent; make me understand how I have gone astray.
zh: 請指教，我就默不作聲； 請指示，我有甚麼過錯。

en: How forceful are upright words! But what does reproof from you reprove?
zh: 正直的言語多麼有力！ 但你們的責備究竟責備甚麼呢？

en: Do you think that you can reprove words, when the speech of a despairing man is wind?
zh: 絕望人的話不過是風， 你們還想批判嗎？

en: You would even cast lots over the fatherless, and bargain over your friend.
zh: 你們竟抽籤得孤兒， 拿朋友當貨物。

en: "But now, be pleased to look at me, for I will not lie to your face.
zh: 現在請你們看看我， 我絕不當你們的面撒謊。

en: Please turn; let no injustice be done. Turn now; my vindication is at stake.
zh: 請轉意，不要不公道； 請再轉意，我還有道理在。

en: Is there any injustice on my tongue? Cannot my palate discern the cause of calamity?
zh: 我的舌上有不義嗎？ 我的口不能辨別災害嗎？”
